text.title: PHP Dual Gate: PHPStan Level 9 + Psalm Taint Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: author-psalm-xml
step.action: Author psalm.xml with taintAnalysis enabled; generate baseline.

step.name: wire-ci-jobs
step.action: Add two parallel jobs: phpstan analyse + psalm.

step.name: ratchet-baseline
step.action: Reduce baseline entries by ≥ 5%; refuse PR that grows baseline.
